schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
schemes.benefit: ₹6,000 per year, disbursed in three equal installments of ₹2,000 via Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT).

eligibility.target_group: Small and marginal landholding farmer families
eligibility.land_requirement: Must own cultivable land in their name

schemes.application_process: Register via the PM-Kisan portal (pmkisan.gov.in) or at the nearest Common Service Centre (CSC). Mandatory e-KYC and Aadhaar-seeded bank account required.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemes.benefit: Comprehensive insurance cover against failure of crops due to natural calamities, pests, and disease outbreaks.

eligibility.target_group: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas
eligibility.crops_covered: Food & oilseeds crops, annual commercial/horticultural crops
eligibility.additional_criteria: Premium capped at 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, and 5% for commercial/horticultural crops.

schemes.application_process: Apply via banks, CSCs, or the PMFBY portal. Localized damage must be reported within 72 hours via the Crop Insurance App or toll-free numbers.

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC) Scheme
schemes.benefit: Flexible short-term credit for agricultural operations. Loans up to ₹3 lakh at a concessional interest rate of 7%, with a 3% subvention for timely repayment (effective rate 4%). Collateral-free loan up to ₹1.6 lakh.

eligibility.target_group: All farmers, including tenant farmers, oral lessees, sharecroppers, and animal husbandry/fishery farmers.

schemes.application_process: Submit application to a local commercial bank, RRB, or Cooperative bank. Applications can also be initiated via the PM-KISAN portal for existing beneficiaries.

schemes.name: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund (AIF)
schemes.benefit: Interest subvention of 3% per annum and credit guarantee coverage under CGTMSE for loans up to ₹2 crore for post-harvest management projects.

eligibility.target_group: Farmers, FPOs, PACS, Marketing Cooperative Societies, Startups, and Agri-entrepreneurs.
eligibility.additional_criteria: Projects must relate to post-harvest management infrastructure or community farming assets.

schemes.application_process: Apply online via the National Agriculture Infra Financing Facility (NAIFF) portal (agriinfra.dac.gov.in).

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY) - Per Drop More Crop
schemes.benefit: Subsidy assistance for installing micro-irrigation systems (Drip and Sprinkler) to enhance water use efficiency.

eligibility.target_group: All farmers, with higher subsidy percentages generally offered to small/marginal farmers and SC/ST farmers depending on state guidelines.
eligibility.land_requirement: Must have access to a water source and agricultural land.

schemes.application_process: Apply through the State Agriculture/Horticulture Department portals or approach the District Agriculture Officer.

schemes.name: Namo Drone Didi
schemes.benefit: Provides drones to Women Self Help Groups (SHGs) to rent to farmers for agricultural purposes (pesticide/fertilizer spraying), promoting tech adoption and female entrepreneurship.

eligibility.target_group: Women Self Help Groups (SHGs) recognized under DAY-NRLM.

schemes.application_process: Implemented via State Nodal Agencies under the Ministry of Rural Development and DAY-NRLM. Approach local rural development offices for SHG enrollment.
